ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "stkcd" INTEGER /* Stock code representing the stock */,
  "trddt" TEXT /* Trading date of the stock data */,
  "opnprc" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "hiprc" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "loprc" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "clsprc" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "dnshrtrd" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the trading day */,
  "dnvaltrd" REAL /* Total value traded on the trading day */,
  "dsmvosd" REAL /* Volume of shares outstanding at the day's close */,
  "dsmvtll" REAL /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "dretwd" REAL /* Daily return on the stock */,
  "dretnd" REAL /* Return on the stock since the beginning of the year */,
  "adjprcwd" REAL /* Adjusted closing price on the previous day */,
  "adjprcnd" REAL /* Adjusted closing price on the trading day */,
  "markettype" INTEGER /* Market type (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "capchgdt" TEXT /* Date of the last capitalization change */,
  "trdsta" INTEGER /* Trading status indicator (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  "trdvol" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  "avgprc" REAL /* Average price of the stock */,
  "updtdt" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stkcd", "trddt"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_markettype FOREIGN KEY ("markettype") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stkcd" INTEGER /* Unique stock code for identification */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category for the stock */,
  "listed_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stkcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the market is open for trading */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone in which the market operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account held by the trader (e.g., individual, corporate) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the trader registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the session takes place */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the trading session */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who placed the order */,
  "stkcd" INTEGER /* Stock code associated with the order */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at which the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., executed, pending) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the order expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_stkcd FOREIGN KEY ("stkcd") REFERENCES stocks ("stkcd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader whose balance is tracked */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the trader */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the balance was last updated */,
  "available_balance" REAL /* Available balance for trading */,
  "blocked_balance" REAL /* Blocked balance due to pending trades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stkcd" INTEGER /* Stock code associated with the price record */,
  "trddt" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "clsprc" REAL /* Closing price on the record date */,
  "adjprc" REAL /* Adjusted closing price on the record date */,
  "trdvol" INTEGER /* Total trading volume on the record date */,
  "avgprc" REAL /* Average price on the record date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stkcd FOREIGN KEY ("stkcd") REFERENCES stocks ("stkcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market associated with the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was first established */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index on the base date */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., price-weighted, market-capitalization-weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indexes_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., momentum, mean-reversion) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the strategy on the evaluation date */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk of the strategy on the evaluation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  "risk_tolerance" REAL /* Risk tolerance of the trader */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss level for the trader */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit level for the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)
